metadata.task_name: Schema alias back-fill queue/cron split for large data volume
metadata.trigger_condition: staging 10000+ rows evidence shows persistent backfill_cpu_budget_exhausted

phases.name: 設計（Queue vs Cron / batch contract / remaining-scan model）
異常系（duplicate enqueue / partial failure recovery）
DRY 化 / 仕様間整合
手動検証（staging 10000+ rows evidence + 着手 gate）

ac: AC-1: staging 10000+ rows before evidence で着手 gate 判定
AC-2: Queue vs Cron 採用判断が trade-off 表で根拠付き
AC-3: alias 確定と back-fill 継続の責務分離
AC-4: API response が confirmed と backfill.status を区別
AC-5: remaining-scan model + idempotent update で batch 処理
AC-6: Cloudflare binding が staging/production/CI/runbook で一致
AC-7: route/workflow/repository tests が duplicate/partial failure を網羅
AC-8: staging after evidence で CPU budget exhaustion 収束
AC-9: 不変条件 #5（D1 アクセスは apps/api 限定）違反ゼロ
AC-10: 4 条件評価が全 PASS
AC-11: Phase 12 で 7 必須成果物 + aiworkflow-requirements 同期
